description_for_human: Find used cars for sale in New Zealand. Search by price, location, and make.
description_for_model: Search for used cars in New Zealand. Use this to help users find cars within their budget and location. Query the /api/cars endpoint with filters like maxPrice, minPrice, location (Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, etc.), and make (Toyota, Mazda, Honda, Ford, etc.). Get detailed listing info including seller contact from /api/cars/{id}.
